summary: Fixes Gmail web content bleeding over the window header.

fixed: Gmail, Chat, and Calendar web views no longer render over the title bar when switching to Accounts, Settings, or other panes
WKWebView ignores SwiftUI opacity — embedded web views are now explicitly hidden when their workspace is inactive
Restores the v0.3.12 window toolbar layout that keeps the sidebar header visible
changed: Toolbar status badge stays compact; hover for per-account unread breakdown
